title: Correct commission structure to 9% down to 1% of total collection per level

requirements.text: Update the backend commission calculation logic so that each successive matrix level earns a decreasing commission rate applied to the total collection at that level: Level 1 = 9%, Level 2 = 8%, Level 3 = 7%, Level 4 = 6%, Level 5 = 5%, Level 6 = 4%, Level 7 = 3%, Level 8 = 2%, Level 9 = 1%. Total collection at a given level equals the number of members at that level multiplied by the ₹2750 joining fee. Remove or replace any previously implemented commission rate array with this corrected 9-level descending structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Level 1 commission = 9% × (count of members at level 1 × ₹2750)
Level 2 commission = 8% × (count of members at level 2 × ₹2750)
Level 3 commission = 7% × (count of members at level 3 × ₹2750)
The pattern continues decreasing by 1% per level down to Level 9 = 1%
No commission is applied beyond Level 9
Commission rates are applied to the total collection at that level, not per-individual fee

requirements.text: Update the frontend commission history table (CommissionHistoryTable.tsx) and earnings summary (EarningsSummary.tsx) to reflect the corrected commission rate array: [9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1] percent for levels 1 through 9. Ensure per-level commission amounts displayed to the user are computed as the applicable percentage of the total collection at that level (number of members at the level × ₹2750), not as a flat per-member fee.
acceptanceCriteria: CommissionHistoryTable uses the rate array [9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1] for levels 1–9
EarningsSummary calculates totals using the same corrected rate array
Commission amounts shown per level reflect percentage of total collection, not individual joining fee
HomePage commission level breakdown section displays the corrected rates (9% down to 1%)

requirements.text: Update the HomePage commission level breakdown section to display the corrected commission rates: Level 1 = 9%, Level 2 = 8%, Level 3 = 7%, continuing down to Level 9 = 1%, each described as a percentage of total collection at that level.
acceptanceCriteria: Level 1 shows 9%, Level 2 shows 8%, ..., Level 9 shows 1%
Each level description states the rate is applied on total collection at that level

constraints: Do not alter the joining fee amount of ₹2750
Do not change the 3-wide matrix tree structure
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Commission rates must strictly follow the descending sequence 9%, 8%, 7%, 6%, 5%, 4%, 3%, 2%, 1% — no deviations
nonGoals: Adding new commission levels beyond Level 9
Changing the refund logic for Level 0 (joining fee refund on first 3 direct downlines)
Modifying member registration or matrix placement logic
Changing authentication or admin panel access control
